items.claim: Sam Patterson has a poor chin and gets hurt easily.
Sam Patterson will be more reckless in this fight due to the negative comments and hate he received after his last fight.
items.quote: Sam's going to be more reckless than he is last fight, especially after all of the hate or bad comments he got after last fight.

items.claim: Santiago can crack Sam Patterson and might hurt him.
items.quote: I think Santiago could crack Sam in this fight. I wouldn't be surprised to see Santiago hurt Sam

items.claim: Dustin Jacobe was originally getting ready to fight Urani Bodv before that opponent pulled out.
items.quote: Dustin Jacobe was getting ready for a fight against Urani Bodv. And I guess he had to pull out of the fight.

items.claim: Muhammad Sed is stepping in on short notice.
items.quote: this guy's coming in on short notice

items.claim: Muhammad Sed trains with Bogdan and Volto Walker at Gore MMA.
items.quote: S trains with Bogdan and Volto Walker at Gore MMA.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on 16 days notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's taken this one on 16 days noticed.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein was originally scheduled to fight on the Ultimate Fighter and later booked against Muin Gaffarov before Gaffarov pulled out.
items.quote: Hussein was scheduled to fight on the Ultimate Fighter... He was then booked against Muin Gaffarov. Gaffroof have to pull out.
